data.current_description: Retrieve RxNorm concepts with a specified status
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve all RxNorm concepts filtered by status
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all RxNorm concepts that match a specified status value. Accepts a status parameter to filter concepts (e.g., active, inactive, obsolete). Returns a collection of RxNorm concept objects matching the status filter. Useful for discovering all concepts in a particular lifecycle state.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks clarity about what status values are accepted, what the response contains, and the use case. Added parameter context, response details, and practical use case information to help AI agents understand when to use this operation.

data.current_summary: Get all concepts by term type
data.current_description: Retrieve RxNorm concepts filtered by term type classification
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve all RxNorm concepts filtered by term type
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all RxNorm concepts matching a specified term type (TTY) classification. Accepts a TTY parameter to filter concepts by their term type category (e.g., brand names, generic names, clinical drugs). Returns a collection of RxNorm concept objects with the specified term type. Useful for discovering all concepts within a particular terminology classification.
data.reasoning: Original description is vague about acceptable TTY values and response structure. Enhanced with specific examples of TTY values, clarification of what is returned, and practical use case to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Retrieve available property categories
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve list of available property categories in RxNorm. Returns all property category types that can be used to filter or retrieve concept properties. Useful for understanding what property categories are available when querying concept attributes.
data.reasoning: Description is too vague and lacks context about what property categories are used for. Enhanced description clarifies the purpose of property categories and their relationship to concept properties, improving AI agent understanding of when to use this metadata operation.

data.current_description: Retrieve list of available property names
data.description_suggestion: Returns a list of all available property names that can be queried for RxNorm concepts. Returns a collection of property name strings that can be used with the getProperty operation.

data.current_description: Retrieve proprietary vocabulary source strings for a given RxCUI
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve proprietary drug names for RxCUI
data.description_suggestion: Returns proprietary vocabulary source strings (brand names and proprietary designations) associated with a specific RxCUI concept. Requires the RxCUI parameter identifying the drug concept. Returns a collection of proprietary name strings from various pharmaceutical sources. Useful for finding alternative commercial names for a drug.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks clarity about what 'proprietary vocabulary source strings' means in practical terms. Added explanation that these are brand names and proprietary designations, clarified the required RxCUI parameter, specified the return format, and explained the use case for AI agents.

message: Operation 'getProperty' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description is incomplete regarding parameters and return format. Added clarity about the two required parameters, referenced the getPropNames operation for discovery, explained the return format, and provided examples of queryable properties to help AI agents understand when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Retrieve a specific property value for a given RxCUI
data.description_suggestion: Returns the value of a specified property for a given RxCUI concept. Requires two parameters: the RxCUI identifying the drug concept and the property name (which can be discovered using getPropNames). Returns the property value as a string or structured data depending on the property type. Supports querying metadata such as drug strength, route of administration, and other clinical attributes.
data.reasoning: Original description is incomplete regarding parameters and return format. Added clarity about the two required parameters, referenced the getPropNames operation for discovery, explained the return format, and provided examples of queryable properties to help AI agents understand when and how to use this operation.

message: Operation 'getReformulationConcepts' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description lacks specificity about what constitutes a reformulation and doesn't explain the parameter or return format. data.current_description: Find drug concepts that are reformulations of each other
data.description_suggestion: Returns RxCUI concepts that represent reformulations of a given drug concept. Reformulations include changes to drug formulation, strength, or delivery mechanism while maintaining the same active ingredient. Requires an RxCUI parameter identifying the base drug concept. Returns a collection of related RxCUI concepts representing different formulations. Useful for identifying alternative formulations of the same medication.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks specificity about what constitutes a reformulation and doesn't explain the parameter or return format. Added definition of reformulation in pharmaceutical context, clarified the required RxCUI parameter, specified the return format, and explained the practical use case for AI agents.

message: Operation 'getRelationshipPaths' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description is vague about what 'traverse' means and doesn't specify the required parameters or return format. Added clarity about the two RxCUI parameters, explained that it searches the relationship graph, specified the return format including relationship types, and explained the use case for understanding drug concept relationships.

data.current_description: Traverse relationship paths between concepts
data.summary_suggestion: Find relationship paths between drug concepts
data.description_suggestion: Returns the relationship paths connecting two RxNorm concepts through their semantic relationships. Requires two parameters: source RxCUI and target RxCUI identifying the concepts to connect. Traverses the RxNorm relationship graph to find intermediate concepts and relationship types linking the source to target. Returns a collection of paths, each containing a sequence of concepts and their relationship types. Useful for understanding how drug concepts are semantically related in the RxNorm hierarchy.
data.reasoning: Original description is vague about what 'traverse' means and doesn't specify the required parameters or return format. Added clarity about the two RxCUI parameters, explained that it searches the relationship graph, specified the return format including relationship types, and explained the use case for understanding drug concept relationships.

data.current_description: Find RxNorm concepts that approximately match a search term using fuzzy matching
